creator: rink@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 158407
Boot log

FreeBSD/mips on a RouterStation Pro panics shortly after reboot:

Reproduces 100%. I only started getting the panic after 'gateway_enable=YES' in /etc/rc.conf
